use_cases: Displaying user activity history in fitness or travel applications with a stacked card layout
Showing timeline of past experiences with expandable/collapsible card sections
Creating an interactive activity feed with visual color-coded cards
Building a compact card gallery that toggles between summary and full view
Organizing multiple activity entries with hierarchical visual stacking
ai_summary: A stacked activity card component that displays multiple activity entries in an overlapping card layout. Features a toggle button to show/hide all cards and uses colored blocks to differentiate activities. The component supports expand/collapse interaction with visual hover states, making it suitable for displaying user activity history, travel experiences, or event timelines in a visually engaging card format.
